<h1>Source code for booktx.models</h1><div class="highlight"><pre>
<span></span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Pydantic data models for the booktx translation contract.</span>

<span class="sd">This module defines the JSON shapes that cross the boundary between booktx and</span>
<span class="sd">the translating coding agent:</span>

<span class="sd">- Source chunk  -&gt; ``chunks/NNNN.json``  (written by ``booktx extract``)</span>
<span class="sd">- Translated chunk -&gt; ``translated/NNNN.json`` (written by the agent)</span>

<span class="sd">Both must round-trip through JSON with stable field names and ordering.</span>
<span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># ruff: noqa: E501</span>

    <span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="n">field_validator</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model_serializer</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">model_validator</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="Placeholder">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.Placeholder">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">Placeholder</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A non-translatable span that was replaced by a token during extraction.</span>

<span class="sd">    ``token`` is the exact placeholder text that appears in the source field</span>
<span class="sd">    (e.g. ``__NAME_001__`` or ``__TAG_001__``); ``original`` is the verbatim</span>
<span class="sd">    text that must be restored verbatim during build.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">token</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Placeholder token, e.g. __NAME_001__&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">original</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Original text to restore verbatim&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;name&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;tag&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;tag&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Placeholder kind&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source text with placeholders&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Placeholders present in this record&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">span_record_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Sentence index inside the original prose span&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;plain:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub-inline-xhtml:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_serializer</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;wrap&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_omit_plain_source_markup</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">handler</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]:</span>

        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">payload</span></div>

<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A single translated record inside a translated chunk.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>

    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Translated text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_version_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_omit_none_version</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">handler</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]:</span>
        <span class="n">payload</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">handler</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A source chunk file (``chunks/NNNN.json``).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Chunk id, e.g. 0001&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Configured max records per chunk&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk-local:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Record id scheme used by this extraction&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;BCP-47-ish source code, e.g. en&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;BCP-47-ish target code kept for legacy compatibility&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslatedChunk">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslatedChunk">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslatedChunk</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A translated chunk file (``translated/NNNN.json``).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># Allow extra keys to be *detectable* rather than silently dropped, but we</span>
    <span class="c1"># do not want pydantic to throw on load; the validator enforces the contract.</span>
    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;allow&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Chunk id, e.g. 0001&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslatedRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="StoredTranslationRecord">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecord">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StoredTranslationRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One accepted record stored in ``translation-store.json``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Owning chunk id, e.g. 0001&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;SHA256 of the source record text when accepted&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Accepted target text&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;UTC timestamp of the latest accepted update&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationStore">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationStore">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationStore</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Primary record-level translation state owned by booktx.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Current project source SHA256&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationCandidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationCandidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One candidate translation stored under a record version.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">reviewed_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">reviewed_by</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_note</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;baseline_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_version_ref_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">value</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_version_ref_matches_fields</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">expected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;version_ref </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> must equal </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">expected</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationReviewCandidate">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationReviewCandidate">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One reviewed target stored separately from translation versions.</span>

<span class="sd">    A review candidate records one quality-improved output of a numbered</span>
<span class="sd">    review pass (``R&lt;pass&gt;.&lt;run&gt;``). It is derived from a *base* candidate,</span>
<span class="sd">    which is either a translation version (``base_kind=&quot;translation&quot;``) or an</span>
<span class="sd">    earlier review candidate (``base_kind=&quot;review&quot;``). Review candidates</span>
<span class="sd">    never overwrite translation versions.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>

    <span class="c1"># What this review was based on.</span>
    <span class="n">base_kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">base_target_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>

    <span class="c1"># Output of the review pass.</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;rejected&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;superseded&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;accepted&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># Evidence and provenance.</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">reviewed_by</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_note</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="c1"># Context evidence.</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_window_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_policy_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;review_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_review_ref_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_review_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_review_ref_matches_fields</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">expected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_review_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;review_ref </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> must equal </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">expected</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_review_graph_is_acyclic</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Reject cycles in the review derivation graph.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">by_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="n">current</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">start</span>
        <span class="k">while</span> <span class="n">current</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;cycle detected in review graph at </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">break</span>
            <span class="n">current</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">by_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">current</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_review_pass_order</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A review based on another review must use a greater (pass, run) tuple.</span>

<span class="sd">    The total order is lexicographic on ``(pass_number, run_number)``: a review</span>
<span class="sd">    based on another review must satisfy</span>
<span class="sd">    ``(new.pass, new.run) &gt; (base.pass, base.run)``. This permits reruns of</span>
<span class="sd">    the same pass (``R1.2`` from ``R1.1``), keeps higher-pass reviews based on</span>
<span class="sd">    lower-pass reviews (``R2.1`` from ``R1.2``), and rejects equal or older</span>
<span class="sd">    tuples (``R1.2`` from ``R1.2`` or ``R1.1`` from ``R1.2``).</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">by_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">base</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">by_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">base</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> (pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;run </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">) must be greater than base &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> (pass </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">, &quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;run </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">base</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">run_number</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">)&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="StoredTranslationRecordV2">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.StoredTranslationRecordV2">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One source record with nested versioned translation candidates.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">active_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">active_review</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationCandidate</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationReviewCandidate</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_version&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_active_version_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">value</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_review&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_active_review_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">value</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">value</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_review_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_versions</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">candidate</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;duplicate version_ref </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> in record&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidate</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_version </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_version</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> is not present in versions&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_reviews</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">review</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;duplicate review_ref </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> in record&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_kind</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">v</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">v</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">versions</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> references missing &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation base </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="nb">any</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">r</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">r</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">):</span>
                    <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> references missing &quot;</span>
                        <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;review base </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">review</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                    <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_review </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">active_review</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> has no matching review&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">_validate_review_graph_is_acyclic</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">_validate_review_pass_order</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">reviews</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationStoreV2">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationStoreV2">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Primary nested translation state for booktx.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">2</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">StoredTranslationRecordV2</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_record_keys</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationStoreV2</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="n">expected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">canonical_record_id</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">part_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record key </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> must equal canonical id </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">expected</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One context-scoped subversion entry inside a major track.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">context_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;.booktx/context.json&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_full_context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">legacy_full_context_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_label</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">updated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">notes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">forced</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;version_ref&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_subversion_version_ref_shape</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">value</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">parse_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">value</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationSubversionLedgerEntry</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">expected</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">format_version_ref</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversion</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">expected</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;version_ref </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version_ref</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> must equal </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">expected</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;context_sha256 must not be empty&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>

    <span class="p">)</span>

        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">subversion_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">subversions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>

                <span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span>

    <span class="n">target_allowed</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_forbidden</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_regex_forbidden</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">preferred_policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;advisory&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;required&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;info&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">sense</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">rationale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">examples</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ApplicableTermbaseExampleSnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">usage_rules</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ApplicableTermbaseUsageRuleSnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ApplicableTermbaseFindingSnapshot">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ApplicableTermbaseFindingSnapshot">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ApplicableTermbaseFindingSnapshot</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One deterministic termbase audit finding persisted on a review task record.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">entry_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">rule_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">context_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbidden_target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;preferred_missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;clean&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">rule_code</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">severity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;info&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">reason</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">target_forbidden_found</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_required_found</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_allowed_found</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">effective_candidate_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">prompt</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">fallback</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span></div>



<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ApplicableGlossaryEntrySnapshot</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One applicable binding glossary entry snapshot persisted on a judge task record.</span>

<span class="sd">    Parallel to :class:`ApplicableTermbaseEntrySnapshot` but for the profile</span>
<span class="sd">    glossary. Only binding entries (enforce != off with a required target or a</span>
<span class="sd">    forbidden target) are snapshotted, so the judge task can show the exact</span>
<span class="sd">    approved/forbidden policy next to the source record.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_variants</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">matched_source_cue</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">target_variants</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">require_target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">forbidden_targets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">enforce</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">case_sensitive</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">notes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationTaskRecord">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationTaskRecord">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationTaskRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A record assigned to a CLI-created translation task.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Record id, e.g. 0001-000001&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Owning chunk id, e.g. 0001&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Source text with placeholders&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ApplicableTermbaseEntrySnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationTask">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationTask">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationTask</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A persisted work item returned by ``booktx translate next``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
