    <span class="n">task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">unit</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;batch&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Active translation version ref when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Baseline version ref when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Baseline context hash when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Context hash when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Task-scoped effective context view hash&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Project-relative path to the immutable task context snapshot&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256 of binding glossary fields when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256 of applicable termbase entry snapshots when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_scope</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;How chapter notes were selected for this task context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_target_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target chapter id used to compose the task context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">context_notes_through_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Highest prior chapter note included in the task context&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Project source hash when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Canonical profile-config hash when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Canonical source-config hash when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">record_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">requested_max_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationTaskRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ReviewContextRecord">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ReviewContextRecord">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ReviewContextRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One neighbor or selected record in a review task context window.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">effective_target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">effective_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">role</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;before&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;selected&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationReviewTaskRecord">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationReviewTaskRecord">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationReviewTaskRecord</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One selected record in a review task.</span>

<span class="sd">    Carries the base candidate being reviewed plus the review_ref this task</span>
<span class="sd">    will create, so a single task can safely include records whose next run</span>
<span class="sd">    number differs.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>

    <span class="c1"># Candidate being reviewed.</span>
    <span class="n">base_kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;review&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="n">base_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">base_target</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">base_target_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>

    <span class="c1"># The review candidate this task record will create.</span>
    <span class="n">review_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>

    <span class="c1"># Context evidence.</span>
    <span class="n">review_window_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">before</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ReviewContextRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">after</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ReviewContextRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">applicable_termbase</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ApplicableTermbaseEntrySnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">termbase_findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ApplicableTermbaseFindingSnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationReviewTask">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationReviewTask">[docs]</a>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">review_task_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">pass_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">pass_instructions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">context_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_view_path</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">source_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">review_policy_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256 of binding glossary fields when the task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">applicable_termbase_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256 of applicable termbase entry snapshots when the review task was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">before_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">after_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">source_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">record_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationReviewTaskRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationTodoChapter">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationTodoChapter">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationTodoChapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One chapter selected for a bounded agent translation run.</span>

<span class="sd">    embeds source text. Source text belongs in per-task ``*.source.block.txt``.</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">records_translated_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">records_remaining_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">source_words_remaining_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">pending_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="StatusTotals">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.StatusTotals">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">StatusTotals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Aggregate translation coverage totals.</span>

<span class="sd">    Used by ``status --json`` and persisted in ``TranslationTodo.start_totals``.</span>
<span class="sd">    Keep this model in ``models.py`` so durable todo validation never depends on</span>
<span class="sd">    a late Pydantic forward-reference rebuild.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">translated_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">remaining_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">records_translated</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">records_remaining</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_partial</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chunks_pending</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_complete</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_partial</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_pending</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">invalid_translation_files</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">stale_translation_files</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationTodo">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationTodo">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationTodo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A durable run-control artifact for a bounded multi-chapter agent run.</span>

<span class="sd">    Written by ``booktx translate todo-next`` under</span>
<span class="sd">    ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/todos/&lt;todo_id&gt;.{json,md}``. This is NOT a</span>
<span class="sd">    translation submission: it tells the agent how many chapters to complete,</span>
<span class="sd">    the per-task word budget, and the stop conditions.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">todo_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_requested</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">batch_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">max_run_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">include_current</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">baseline_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">context_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">mandatory_glossary_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sha256 of binding glossary fields when the todo was created&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">start_totals</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">StatusTotals</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">TranslationTodoChapter</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="NamesFile">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.NamesFile">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">NamesFile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;The ``.booktx/names.json`` file holding manually protected terms.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SourceAnalysisPatternsConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.SourceAnalysisPatternsConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SourceAnalysisPatternsConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Optional source-analysis pattern configuration.</span>

<span class="sd">    Stored under ``[source_analysis.patterns]`` in ``.booktx/source-config.toml``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">world_morphemes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">include_regex</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">exclude_regex</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SourceAnalysisGenericLemmasConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.SourceAnalysisGenericLemmasConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SourceAnalysisGenericLemmasConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">extra</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SourceAnalysisConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.SourceAnalysisConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SourceAnalysisConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Optional translation-risk mining configuration for source analysis.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">include_singletons</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">max_per_bucket</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">80</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">min_risk_score</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">float</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mf">3.0</span>
    <span class="n">patterns</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceAnalysisPatternsConfig</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">SourceAnalysisPatternsConfig</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">generic_lemmas</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceAnalysisGenericLemmasConfig</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">SourceAnalysisGenericLemmasConfig</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SourceConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.SourceConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SourceConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Source-only config stored in ``.booktx/source-config.toml``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Filename inside source/&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nb">format</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Document format&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Max records per chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_analysis</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SourceAnalysisConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;format&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_source_format_ok</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">v</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">v</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">v</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">v</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">}:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;format must be &#39;markdown&#39; or &#39;epub&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">v</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ProfileIdentityConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ProfileIdentityConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProfileIdentityConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Initial identity defaults captured when a profile is created.</span>

<span class="sd">    This is **not** the live identity. After creation, the authoritative</span>
<span class="sd">    identity lives in ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/identity.json`` and is updated</span>
<span class="sd">    by ``booktx model set`` / ``actor set`` / ``harness set``. Profile list</span>
<span class="sd">    and show render the resolved ``identity.json`` value, not this field.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">actor</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;user:unknown&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">harness</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;booktx&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">model</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;human&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ReviewPassConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ReviewPassConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ReviewPassConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Configuration for one numbered review pass.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">enabled</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;manual&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;after_chapter&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;before_build&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;manual&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">enforce</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;warn&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;error&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;off&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># What this pass reviews.</span>
    <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;active_translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;active_review&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;active_translation&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">required_base_pass</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="c1"># Context window.</span>
    <span class="n">before_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">le</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">after_records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">le</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">batch_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">900</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Task prompt behavior.</span>
    <span class="n">instructions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">include_untranslated_neighbors</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="QualityReviewConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.QualityReviewConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">QualityReviewConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Profile-level quality-review configuration.</span>

<span class="sd">    Optional on ``ProfileConfig`` so existing ``config.toml`` files without a</span>
<span class="sd">    ``[quality_review]`` table round-trip unchanged.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">enabled</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">active_passes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">])</span>
    <span class="n">require_all_active_passes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">passes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ReviewPassConfig</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ReviewTodoPass">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ReviewTodoPass">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ReviewTodoPass</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One review pass selected for a durable review todo.</span>

<span class="sd">    Carries the pass_number, selection mode, and base mode that will be used</span>
<span class="sd">    when this pass is resumed via ``review todo-resume``.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">pass_number</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">...</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">selection</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;missing&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;stale&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;reviewed&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;all&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;changed-base&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;missing&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">base</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;active_translation&quot;</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ReviewTodoChapter">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ReviewTodoChapter">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ReviewTodoChapter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;One chapter tracked by a durable review todo.</span>

<span class="sd">    Captures review coverage at the moment the todo was created so callers</span>
<span class="sd">    can detect progress and drift without re-reading the entire store.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">status</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">eligible_records_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">missing_review_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">stale_review_at_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">pending_passes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ReviewTodo">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ReviewTodo">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ReviewTodo</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;A durable run-control artifact for a bounded multi-pass review run.</span>

<span class="sd">    Written by ``booktx review todo-next`` under</span>
<span class="sd">    ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/review-todos/&lt;review_todo_id&gt;.{json,md}``.</span>
<span class="sd">    This tells the agent which review passes and chapters to process,</span>
<span class="sd">    the per-pass selection and base modes, and the stop conditions.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">review_todo_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">passes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ReviewTodoPass</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapters_requested</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">batch_words</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span>
    <span class="n">created_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">source_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">start_snapshot_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ReviewTodoChapter</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="SelectionConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.SelectionConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">SelectionConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Selection-profile configuration stored under ``[selection]``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">sources</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">allow_edited_targets</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">True</span>
    <span class="n">require_all_sources</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="n">purpose</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;compare&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;revise&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;compare&quot;</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_revision_sources</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">SelectionConfig</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">purpose</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;revise&quot;</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sources</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;selection.purpose=revise requires exactly one configured source&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>

    <span class="n">selection_purpose</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;compare&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;revise&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;compare&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">JudgeTaskRecord</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">JudgeSourceProfileSnapshot</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Per-source snapshot of one copied translation profile store.</span>

<span class="sd">    Captured under ``judge-sources/snapshots/SNAPSHOT_ID/profiles/&lt;profile&gt;/``.</span>
<span class="sd">    All hashes are SHA-256 over the exact UTF-8 bytes written (including the</span>
<span class="sd">    trailing newline) for copied JSON files; ``profile_config_sha256`` and</span>
<span class="sd">    ``source_sha256`` reuse booktx&#39;s canonical identity/config hashing.</span>
<span class="sd">    Optional ``None`` hashes mark files that were absent in the live source and</span>
<span class="sd">    therefore omitted from the immutable generation.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">profile_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">translation_store_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">translation_version_ledger_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">identity_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">records_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">effective_candidates_total</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="n">copied_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>


<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">JudgeSourcesSnapshotManifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Durable active-generation manifest for a selection profile&#39;s copied sources.</span>

<span class="sd">    Written to ``judge-sources/manifest.json`` and atomically replaced on every</span>
<span class="sd">    publication. ``snapshot_id`` is a deterministic digest of the configured</span>
<span class="sd">    source list plus copied content hashes (excluding timestamps) so an</span>
<span class="sd">    unchanged sync is a true no-op. Published generations are immutable; the</span>
<span class="sd">    manifest never stores absolute paths.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">selection_profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">snapshot_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">selection_profile_config_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_profiles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profiles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">JudgeSourceProfileSnapshot</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">generated_at</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>

    <span class="n">findings</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="TranslationSelectionLedger">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.TranslationSelectionLedger">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">TranslationSelectionLedger</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Profile-local provenance ledger for a selection profile.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_profiles</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">JudgeDecision</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="nd">@model_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;after&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_validate_record_keys</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">self</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">TranslationSelectionLedger</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">decision</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="bp">self</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">items</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">decision</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                    <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;record key </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2"> must equal decision.record_id </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">decision</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">record_id</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span>
                <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="bp">self</span></div>

<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">IndexesConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EpubOutputConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.EpubOutputConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EpubOutputConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Optional EPUB output-language and hyphenation policy.</span>

<span class="sd">    Stored under ``[epub_output]`` in profile or legacy config.</span>

<span class="sd">    When ``None`` (the default), booktx resolves effective policy from the</span>
<span class="sd">    profile kind: translation and legacy translation projects default to</span>
<span class="sd">    ``target`` language / ``auto`` hyphenation; pass-through profiles default to</span>
<span class="sd">    ``preserve`` / ``preserve`` (byte-identical output). Storing the model</span>
<span class="sd">    opts the project into an explicit policy.</span>

<span class="sd">    See ``booktx.epub_output_policy`` for resolution and validation.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">language_policy</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;source&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;preserve&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;explicit&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;target&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;How to resolve the primary OPF/XHTML output language.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Explicit BCP-47-style tag; required when language_policy=&#39;explicit&#39;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">hyphenation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;auto&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;manual&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;none&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;preserve&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;auto&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Deterministic CSS hyphenation policy.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">inject_css</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Inject the generated policy CSS.&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">patch_body_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">bool</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Also patch body@lang/xml:lang; root attributes are always patched for non-preserve policy.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="ProfileConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ProfileConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProfileConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Per-profile translation config stored in ``translations/&lt;profile&gt;/config.toml``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">kind</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;pass-through&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;selection&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;translation&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Profile kind: &#39;translation&#39;, &#39;pass-through&#39;, or &#39;selection&#39;.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">profile</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">identity</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ProfileIdentityConfig</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">ProfileIdentityConfig</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Initial identity defaults; the live identity is identity.json (see above).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="c1"># Optional quality-review configuration. ``None`` means no [quality_review]</span>
    <span class="c1"># table is present; existing config.toml files round-trip without one.</span>
    <span class="n">selection</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">SelectionConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">quality_review</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">QualityReviewConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">indexes</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">IndexesConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">epub_output</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubOutputConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span></div>
