<div class="viewcode-block" id="ProjectConfig">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.ProjectConfig">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">ProjectConfig</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Effective runtime config, or the legacy ``.booktx/config.toml`` shape.</span>

<span class="sd">    The TOML file mirrors these field names exactly so it stays human-editable.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;en&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target language code&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">target_locale</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Target locale code&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">output_filename</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Output filename override&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_file</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Filename inside source/&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nb">format</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Document format: &#39;markdown&#39; or &#39;epub&#39;&quot;</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Max records per chunk&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">epub_output</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubOutputConfig</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>

    <span class="nd">@field_validator</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;format&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="nd">@classmethod</span>
    <span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_format_ok</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="bp">cls</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">v</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">v</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">v</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">()</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">v</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">}:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;format must be &#39;markdown&#39; or &#39;epub&#39;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">v</span></div>

    <span class="n">document_href</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">spine_index</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">tag_name</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_text_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">source_char_start</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">source_char_end</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">placeholders</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Placeholder</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">source_view_text</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_view_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_markup</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;plain:v1&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">inline_skeleton</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="c1"># Populated from epub2text TextBlock.chapter_id/chapter_title after the</span>
    <span class="c1"># upstream TOC mapper runs. Optional for backward compatibility with</span>

<div class="viewcode-block" id="EpubTemplateData">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.EpubTemplateData">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">EpubTemplateData</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Typed payload stored in ``Manifest.template`` for EPUB v2 projects.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">pipeline</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">epub2text_schema</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span>
    <span class="n">text2epub_manifest</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">navigation</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Capability marker distinguishing legacy navigation-derived manifests from</span>
    <span class="c1"># those whose blocks carry authoritative epub2text chapter annotations. The</span>
    <span class="c1"># default keeps old manifests valid; new extractions set</span>
    <span class="c1"># &quot;epub2text-block-v1&quot; so an all-None annotation set is not mistaken for a</span>
    <span class="c1"># legacy manifest.</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Literal</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub2text-block-v1&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span></div>

    <span class="n">target_language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">description</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Hex digest of source bytes&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span></div>



<div class="viewcode-block" id="Manifest">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.models.Manifest">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">class</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nc">Manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">BaseModel</span><span class="p">):</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;The ``.booktx/manifest.json`` content.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>

    <span class="n">model_config</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ConfigDict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">extra</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;forbid&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">version</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">ManifestSource</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_count</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chunk_size</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ge</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">record_id_scheme</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;chunk-local:v1&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">segmenter</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">names_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Mapping of record id -&gt; placeholder-preserving template location. For</span>
    <span class="c1"># markdown this is enough to rebuild; epub rebuilds walk spine docs.</span>
    <span class="n">template</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">Any</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Field</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">default_factory</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">)</span></div>

</pre></div>
